message:
fix: resolve clippy lints, compilation errors, and swap-thrash logic bug

- Fix wrong crate names in test imports (sbh/sbh_lib → storage_ballast_helper)
- Remove stale #[cfg(feature = "tui")] guards (TUI is always compiled)
- Fix swap thrash detection: invert comparison and use 8 GiB threshold
  per README spec (flag when RAM is high but swap is thrashing)
- Fix integration test pressure_escalation_through_levels: use values
  that land in correct pressure zones (15%/11%/7% for Yellow/Orange/Red)
- Resolve all clippy pedantic/nursery lints: manual_let_else,
  collapsible_if, case_sensitive_file_extension, cast_possible_wrap,
  float_cmp, dead_code, should_panic_without_expect

All 1825 lib tests + 34 integration tests pass. Clippy -D warnings clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
